messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Per-agent Telegram topics, two delivery modes: a non-disruptive QUESTION (queued to the agent as a mailbox note it answers back to the topic) and an explicit REDIRECT (interrupting verified nudge into the pane); all 8 roles, principal-guarded, topic-scoped
What it solves: EPIC — TWO MODES, TWO SLICES. Generalises the standing "Operator" topic (BL-346,
telegramFrontDeskBotCore.ts's ensure-Operator-topic + OPERATOR_TOPIC_NAME) from
ONE shared channel into ONE-PER-AGENT topics for all 8 roles, alongside the
existing per-ticket BL topics — a NEW class of topic, not a re…
How it works: Every swarm role has its own topic named for that role

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-425 - Per-agent Telegram topics, two delivery modes: a non-disruptive QUESTION (queued to the agent as a mailbox note it answers back to the topic) and an explicit REDIRECT (interrupting verified nudge into the pane); all 8 roles, principal-guarded, topic-scoped is complete.
